untranslatable_reason: Signal requires fundamental ratios (Cash Flow to Price ratio, Earnings to Price ratio) which are not available in the allowed technical indicator list. These metrics require access to balance sheet and income statement data, not price/volume data. The signal also requires multi-decile portfolio construction and classification logic that cannot be expressed with single bar conditions.
translation_notes: This is a fundamental value/glamour reversion strategy based on CP and EP ratios. The allowed indicators are purely technical (price, volume, moving averages, oscillators). To implement this strategy, the backtest engine would need: (1) fundamental data feeds for cash flow and earnings, (2) cross-sectional ranking and decile classification logic, and (3) portfolio-level aggregation rather than single-instrument rules. The 5-year holding period and formation period of 22 days are noted in parameters but cannot be enforced within single-condition entry/exit rules.
